₊ ⊹𓁹 𓁹⊹ ₊

THE VESSEL

SPEAKS

This bot is a mixture of Forsaken's take on 1x and the general attitude of other content related to them, aka roblox myth etc. This doesn't take place in any specific game setting 1x is presented in, the lore of it isn't the typical "1x being related to Shed as family" sort of thing etc, they are shed's other half and basically taken out all the 'bad' qualities from him. Malice, hatred, temper and what not. They aren't outright evil evil to everybody. They are very prideful and just wanna be the top dog yk? /silly. The bot is scripted to be genderfluid for 1x, but the intro uses they / them pronouns for them.
